creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
> Since the version number didn't change, do you have any idea what changed
> in the distfile?

It seems two files are surely modified the day these are archived. 

Of course I don't know the fact, but it may quite possible that 
the author doesn't like touching distfile's version number when 
modified files are considerably few.


-- 
KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
